## Meeting Purpose

## Key Takeaways

  - [Gina Lee: Freelance developer transitioning into design, seeking team environment for growth](https://fathom.video/share/nespapPcvQaxhEkyBZwNaxo24sriB4_h?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
  - [GrowthX: Early-stage startup with mature revenue, building design team for agency and product work](https://fathom.video/share/nespapPcvQaxhEkyBZwNaxo24sriB4_h?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [Role: Design Engineer for client ops, focusing on landing pages and "microproducts" (2-6 week projects)](https://fathom.video/share/nespapPcvQaxhEkyBZwNaxo24sriB4_h?tab=summary&timestamp=795.0)
  - [Culture: Autonomous, AI-native, flat structure with high-seniority team members](https://fathom.video/share/nespapPcvQaxhEkyBZwNaxo24sriB4_h?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)

## Topics

### Gina Lee's Background

  - [Arts background, switched to computer science](https://fathom.video/share/nespapPcvQaxhEkyBZwNaxo24sriB4_h?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)

  - [Recent focus on merging aesthetics and performance in design](https://fathom.video/share/nespapPcvQaxhEkyBZwNaxo24sriB4_h?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

      - [Led initiative, managed enormous code changes](https://fathom.video/share/nespapPcvQaxhEkyBZwNaxo24sriB4_h?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
      - [Learned importance of QA time](https://fathom.video/share/nespapPcvQaxhEkyBZwNaxo24sriB4_h?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)

### GrowthX Overview

  - [Early-stage startup with mature revenue](https://fathom.video/share/nespapPcvQaxhEkyBZwNaxo24sriB4_h?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [Flat structure, high collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/nespapPcvQaxhEkyBZwNaxo24sriB4_h?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)

  - [Building proprietary software for content creation workflows](https://fathom.video/share/nespapPcvQaxhEkyBZwNaxo24sriB4_h?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)

### Design Engineer Role

  - [Focus: Client ops team, supporting agency side](https://fathom.video/share/nespapPcvQaxhEkyBZwNaxo24sriB4_h?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)
  - [Projects: Landing pages, microproducts (2-6 week duration)](https://fathom.video/share/nespapPcvQaxhEkyBZwNaxo24sriB4_h?tab=summary&timestamp=874.0)
  - [Skills needed: Flexibility, creativity, ability to fill in gaps](https://fathom.video/share/nespapPcvQaxhEkyBZwNaxo24sriB4_h?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)
  - [Ownership: Generally one design engineer per client initiative](https://fathom.video/share/nespapPcvQaxhEkyBZwNaxo24sriB4_h?tab=summary&timestamp=1232.0)
  - [Autonomous work with colleague meetings for specific needs](https://fathom.video/share/nespapPcvQaxhEkyBZwNaxo24sriB4_h?tab=summary&timestamp=978.0)

### Gina's Design Process

  - [Using Figma for design planning](https://fathom.video/share/nespapPcvQaxhEkyBZwNaxo24sriB4_h?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)
  - [Creating mood boards and wireframes](https://fathom.video/share/nespapPcvQaxhEkyBZwNaxo24sriB4_h?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
  - [Building components first, then designing](https://fathom.video/share/nespapPcvQaxhEkyBZwNaxo24sriB4_h?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)
  - [Utilizing AI tools (ChatGPT) for inspiration](https://fathom.video/share/nespapPcvQaxhEkyBZwNaxo24sriB4_h?tab=summary&timestamp=1564.0)
  - [Implementing responsive design (Osmo Scaling System)](https://fathom.video/share/nespapPcvQaxhEkyBZwNaxo24sriB4_h?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)
  - [Coding with Next.js, using Cursor for faster development](https://fathom.video/share/nespapPcvQaxhEkyBZwNaxo24sriB4_h?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)
